expectations.text: Recommends `gt sync` as the primary command
expectations.evidence: Leads with `gt sync` as the single command to run

expectations.text: Does NOT recommend manual `git rebase` or `git pull` as the solution
expectations.evidence: No raw git rebase or pull recommended; explains why `gt sync` is preferred over manual rebase

expectations.text: Explains that `gt sync` handles trunk pull + stack rebase + merged branch cleanup
expectations.evidence: Covers fetch/fast-forward of trunk, per-branch rebase, merged branch deletion prompt, and post-sync `gt submit --stack` to update PRs
